en: You just have to think a little different.
Get lost, come loose, and lose your way.
There ain't no fun in holding back, babe.
You gotta enjoy the thrill of living dangerously.
You've got a long way to go. Keep things safe, you'll never know.
ko: 아직 갈 길이 멀어. 안전하게만 살면 절대 모를 거야.

en: The rules are ours to break.
Come on, babe. It's time to get lost.
ko: 자, 가자. 이제 길을 잃을 시간이야.

en: That is terrible advice. Then you're not listening.
ko: 그건 최악의 조언이야. 그럼 제대로 안 듣고 있는 거야.

en: Not right and left, but up and down. Close on the edge, it's all about living bold and free.
ko: 좌우가 아니라 위아래를 봐. 대담하고 자유롭게 사는 거야.

en: Expand your mind to see, and put your trust in me.
Because you've got potential to travel the distance.
ko: 넌 그 거리를 갈 수 있는 잠재력이 있으니까.

en: I've been existential and lost to existence.
ko: 난 실존적 고민에 빠져 존재를 잃어버렸었어.

en: And there is no map to your destination.
ko: 네 목적지로 가는 지도 같은 건 없어.
